iterations.title: Map current markdown state and design the JSON state model
Resolve the forks and plan the slices to JSON-backed state
P2: state.json I/O behind the Repository seam
P4: rewire lifecycle verbs to state.json + regenerate views
P5: Flip the source of truth
Design the full-content JSON schema for all workstream artifacts
P9: Flip plan — state.json as sole source
P10: Convert objective — objective.json as source
P11: Convert iterations — iterations/NNN.json as source
P12: Convert decisions + retro to JSON source
P7: Retro + close - did state-as-data buy back its ceremony?
P13: JSON-only — stop generating .md views, derive status in-memory
P14: discovery.json + lume reopen; delete last markdown

plan.sketch: Schemas + validator: author workstream/iteration/plan_item JSON Schemas (draft-2020-12 subset) as engine data; vendored stdlib validator raising a named boundary error on mismatch; unit tests cover each schema valid + invalid. No wiring yet.

state.json model behind the Repository seam: a state module that loads+validates and saves+validates a per-workstream state.json (workstream record + iterations + plan items); Repository owns load/save/validate; pure and tested. No verb rewiring yet.

Migration converter: read each workstream's existing markdown (objective/iteration frontmatter + verdict lines + plan-item lines) and emit state.json; idempotent; round-trips the two closed workstreams; this workstream migrated to JSON (dogfood). Prose artifacts left in place.

Data-first model bridge (behaviour-preserving, was "P4a"): Iteration gains to_entity/from_entity + a canonical verdict parser shared with migrate; accepted_on routes through it; no verb/Repository change; all existing tests stay green. Prepares the flip.

Flip the source of truth (was "P4b"): Workstream loads/saves state.json (via Repository) as the truth for status + iterations; open/transition/close/set_status mutate validated state then regenerate views (snapshot.md, iteration frontmatter, objective status); plan.md stays authored + mirrored into state.plan; no machine field read from markdown (grep-verified); tests updated to the state-backed model.

Discovery verbs: `lume entities` lists entity kinds; `lume schema <entity>` prints its JSON Schema; `lume get [-w <slug>] [<entity> [<id>]]` emits current state as JSON. All read-only, machine-parseable, tested.

New schemas: author JSON schemas for objective, iteration_content (DoD preamble + checklist items + self-review + handback), decisions, retro artifacts; unit tests valid + invalid for each. No migration, no CLI wiring.

Flip plan: retire plan.md as authored source; add `lume plan add/update/link` verbs that mutate state.plan; plan.md regenerated as derived view; existing workstreams migrated; no machine field parsed from plan.md.
Convert objective: `lume new` creates objective.json; set_status mutates it; objective.md regenerated as view; existing workstreams migrated; no machine field read from objective.md.

Convert iterations: `lume open` creates iterations/NNN.json; transition verbs populate self-review/handback fields; NNN.md regenerated as view; existing workstreams migrated; no machine field read from NNN.md.
Convert decisions + retro: `lume decide` appends to decisions.json; `lume retro` creates/updates retro.json; both regenerate .md views; existing workstreams migrated.

Retro + close: did JSON-backed state buy back more time than its ceremony? Assess the objective's done-when (state is schema-validated JSON; CLI is sole mutator + exposes discovery/schema verbs; markdown regenerated not authored; this workstream tracked under JSON). Log decisions; lume close.

P13: JSON-only — remove all .md view generation from the engine (objective/plan/iteration/snapshot/decisions/retro + lume new); derive status Done/Now/Next in-memory from state instead of reading snapshot.md; no verb writes any .md. Delete existing generated .md across all workstreams. Update tests.

P14: Authored prose to JSON — add a discovery schema; migrate discovery.md -> discovery.json; add a lume reopen verb (gap: closing gates out transitions, no reopen exists). Delete discovery.md. No .md remains required.
P15: Delete unused render_* view utilities (render_plan, render_iter_md, render_decisions_md, render_retro_md) + their tests; JSON-only leaves no rendering dead code
